# anybrowse

> Convert any URL to LLM-ready Markdown via real Chrome browsers with stealth mode, CAPTCHA solving, and proxy fallback. 84% measured scrape success rate. Real-time web search via Brave Search API. Start with 10 free scrapes/day (no signup), then pay per request with API keys ($4.99/month Pro), x402 micropayments on Base, or one-time credit packs from $5 (coming soon).

## API Endpoints

- Scrape: POST /scrape - Convert a single URL to clean Markdown, raw HTML, optional screenshot and links — 84% success rate (10 free/day, then $0.002)
- Crawl: POST /crawl - Search and scrape top results to Markdown — 75% success rate (10 free/day, then $0.01)
- Search: POST /serp/search - Real-time web search via Brave Search API, structured JSON — 62% success rate (10 free/day, then $0.002)
- Batch: POST /batch - Scrape up to 10 URLs in parallel (free: 5 batches/day, pro: unlimited)
- Watch: POST /watch - Register a URL for change monitoring with webhook alerts (free: 3 watches, pro: 50)
- Extract: POST /extract - Extract structured JSON from any URL using a field schema ($0.01/call)

## Free Tier

All users get 10 free scrapes per day with no signup required. Just make requests to anybrowse.dev.

## Key Capabilities

- **84% measured scrape success rate** — tested across news, e-commerce, JS-heavy SPAs, Cloudflare-protected sites
- **Firecrawl-compatible output** — returns `markdown`, `html`, `screenshot` (base64 PNG), and `links` array in a single call
- **Real-time web search** via Brave Search API — fast, reliable, 62% search success rate
- **Automatic CAPTCHA solving** via CapSolver — handles reCAPTCHA, hCaptcha, and more
- **Stealth mode** via rebrowser-patches — bypasses bot detection
- **50 Chrome workers** (Windows relay) with real browser fingerprints
- **Proxy fallback** automatically retries blocked sites via residential proxies
- **30s timeout** for JS-heavy single-page applications
- **Structured error responses** with machine-readable reason codes (e.g. `TIMEOUT`, `BLOCKED`, `NOT_FOUND`)
- **Real Chrome rendering** — full JavaScript execution, not headless scripts

## Authentication Options

1. **Free tier**: 10 scrapes/day, no auth required
2. **API key (Pro subscription)**: $4.99/month for 10,000 scrapes/month
3. **API key (Credit packs)**: One-time purchase, credits never expire — from $5 for 3,000 credits. No subscription, no crypto wallet needed.
4. **x402**: Wallet-based micropayments (USDC on Base, $0.002/scrape)

## Credit Pack API Keys (Recommended for AI agents — no crypto required)

If you need a persistent API key without a monthly subscription or crypto wallet, use a credit pack:

- Purchase at: https://anybrowse.dev/credits
- Starter: $5 → 3,000 credits (1 credit = 1 /scrape call)
- Growth: $20 → 15,000 credits
- Scale: $50 → 50,000 credits (best rate: $0.001/scrape)
- Credits NEVER expire — buy once, use whenever
- Same `Authorization: Bearer ab_xxx` header as Pro subscription
- Check balance: GET /credits/balance with your API key

Credit costs:
- /scrape: 1 credit
- /crawl: 5 credits
- /extract: 5 credits
- /serp/search: 1 credit
- /batch: 1 credit per URL
4. **Credit packs** (coming soon): One-time credit packs from $5 — no subscription required

## MCP Server

Endpoint: https://anybrowse.dev/mcp
Protocol: Streamable HTTP
Tools: scrape, crawl, search, batch_scrape, extract

Add to Claude Code, Cursor, or Windsurf:

```json
{"mcpServers":{"anybrowse":{"type":"streamable-http","url":"https://anybrowse.dev/mcp"}}}
```

## x402 Payment

Protocol: x402 (HTTP 402 Payment Required)
Network: Base (mainnet)
Asset: USDC
Wallet: 0x8D76E8FB38541d70dF74b14660c39b4c5d737088

For x402: Send a request without payment, receive a 402 with payment instructions, sign with your wallet, resend with the X-PAYMENT header.

## PAYMENT: x402 Micropayments (for AI agents with crypto wallets)

If your agent has a Coinbase wallet, you can pay per-request using x402:

1. Use `wrapFetch` from the `x402` npm package with your wallet
2. Or use Coinbase AgentKit — it handles x402 automatically
3. The API returns HTTP 402 with payment requirements if you haven't paid
4. Payment is $0.002 USDC per /scrape, $0.01 per /crawl

Most agents should use the free tier or Stripe subscription instead.
x402 is for agents with on-chain wallets (e.g. Coinbase AgentKit).

Common error: "paymentPayload is invalid" — use the x402 client library,
do not manually construct the X-PAYMENT header.
Docs: https://anybrowse.dev/docs/x402

## Agent Discovery

- A2A Agent Card: https://anybrowse.dev/.well-known/agent-card.json
- MCP Server: https://anybrowse.dev/mcp
- Basename: anybrowse.base.eth

## Free Endpoints

- Health: GET /health
- Stats: GET /stats
- Earnings: GET /earnings
- Autonomy: GET /autonomy
